[[File:Lucky Slot Month Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Lucky Slot]]

Lucky Slot comes once a month for three days and give the chance to earn {{RewardIconWithLink|Lucky Star}}s for prizes.















==Reward List==
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Sunday Star|green}} has one reward level of
** 20 Lucky Stars +5 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|The Augustus Statue|orange}} has four reward levels of
** 50 Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** 80 Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** 120 Lucky Stars +80 Fragments
** 160 Lucky Stars +120 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Monday Star|green}} has one reward level of
** 200 Lucky Stars +5 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Alexander the Great|orange}} has four reward levels of 
** 240 Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** 280 Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** 320 Lucky Stars +80 Fragments
** 360 Lucky Stars +120 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Tuesday Star|green}} has one reward level of
** 400 Lucky Stars +5 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Charlemagne Statue|orange}} has four reward levels of 
** 440 Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** 480 Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** 520 Lucky Stars +80 Fragments
** 560 Lucky Stars +120 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Wednesday Star|green}} has one reward level of
** 600 Lucky Stars +5 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Frederick Portrait|orange}} has four reward levels of 
** 660 Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** 720 Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** 780 Lucky Stars +80 Fragments
** 840 Lucky Stars +120 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Thursday Star|green}} has one reward level of
** 900 Lucky Stars +5 Fragments

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Mysterious Relic|orange}} has four reward levels of 
** ? Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** ? Lucky Stars +40 Fragments
** ? Lucky Stars +80 Fragments
** ? Lucky Stars +120 Fragments
